title: Aterian (ATER) Recent News & Earnings Updates
text: Aterian agreed to sell its marquee brand portfolio to Trademark Global for $18.0 million, subject to working capital adjustments. The transaction requires stockholder approval and is expected to close in Q2 2026. Additionally, the company received a strategic investment of $7.0 million in preferred stock from David Lazar. Q3 2025 Earnings Results: The company reported third-quarter revenue of $19.0 million versus $26.2 million year-over-year, with a gross margin of 56.1%. Operating expenses decreased to $12.7 million from $17.6 million previously. The firm posted a net loss of $2.3 million and reiterated guidance of $36M-$38M net revenue for the six-month period ending December 31, 2025. Strategic Review Update: Management provided a progress update on its strategic alternatives process, which began in December 2025. The company is working with financial advisor A.G.P/Alliance Global Partners and legal counsel Paul Hastings LLP to evaluate potential transactions including asset sales or mergers. Stock Data as of May 14, 2026: Price $1.15, Market Cap ~$11.5 million, Industry: Furnishings, Fixtures & Appliances.
